name: (Agent) 磁盘读速率
note: 该指标用于统计每秒从测量对象读出数据量。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第六列数据的变化得出磁盘读速率。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：使用WMI中Win32_PerfFormattedData_PerfDisk_LogicalDisk对象获取磁盘I/O数据，每采集周期读取一次该对象，读取该对象返回的瞬时值代表该采集周期的指标值。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。高CPU情况下存在获取超时的现象，会导致无法获取监控数据。

translation.name: (Agent) Disk Read Rate
translation.note: This metric measures the volume of data read from the monitored object per second. Collection method (Linux): The disk read rate is calculated from the change in the sixth column of the corresponding device in /proc/diskstats during the collection period. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Collection method (Windows): Disk I/O data is obtained from the WMI Win32_PerfFormattedData_PerfDisk_LogicalDisk object. The object is read once per collection period, and the instantaneous value it returns represents the metric value for that period. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Under high CPU usage, the query may time out, and monitoring data may fail to be collected.

Collection method (Linux): The disk write IOPS is calculated from the change in the eighth column of the corresponding device in /proc/diskstats during the collection period. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Collection method (Windows): Disk I/O data is obtained from the WMI Win32_PerfFormattedData_PerfDisk_LogicalDisk object. The object is read once per collection period, and the instantaneous value it returns represents the metric value for that period. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. name: 块设备使用率
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象物理磁盘使用率，以百分比为单位。计算方式为: 所有已挂载磁盘分区已用存储量/磁盘存储总量。采集方式（Linux）：通过汇总每个挂载点的磁盘使用量，再通过磁盘扇区大小和扇区数量计算出磁盘总大小，计算出整体磁盘使用率采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: 块设备使用率
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象物理磁盘使用率，以百分比为单位。计算方式为: 所有已挂载磁盘分区已用存储量/磁盘存储总量。采集方式（Linux）：通过汇总每个挂载点的磁盘使用量，再通过磁盘扇区大小和扇区数量计算出磁盘总大小，计算出整体磁盘使用率采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: Block Device Usage
translation.note: This metric measures the physical disk usage of the monitored object, in percent. It is calculated as: used storage of all mounted disk partitions / total disk storage. Collection method (Linux): The disk usage of each mount point is summed up, the total disk size is calculated from the disk sector size and sector count, and the overall disk usage is then derived. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 文件系统读写状态
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象挂载文件系统的读写状态。状态分为：可读写（0）/只读（1）。采集方式（Linux）：通过读取/proc/mounts中第四列文件系统挂载参数获得。

translation.name: (Agent) 文件系统读写状态
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象挂载文件系统的读写状态。状态分为：可读写（0）/只读（1）。采集方式（Linux）：通过读取/proc/mounts中第四列文件系统挂载参数获得。

translation.name: (Agent) File System Read/Write Status
translation.note: This metric indicates the read/write status of the file systems mounted on the monitored object. Status values: read/write (0) or read-only (1). Collection method (Linux): Obtained from the file system mount parameters in the fourth column of /proc/mounts.

name: (Agent) inode空间大小
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前磁盘的inode空间量。采集方式（Linux）：执行df -i命令，查看Inodes列数据。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。

translation.name: (Agent) inode空间大小
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前磁盘的inode空间量。采集方式（Linux）：执行df -i命令，查看Inodes列数据。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。

translation.name: (Agent) Total inodes
translation.note: This metric measures the total inode space of the current disk on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): Run the df -i command and check the Inodes column. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~.

name: (Agent) inode已使用空间
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前磁盘已使用的inode空间量。采集方式（Linux）：执行df -i命令，查看IUsed列数据。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。

translation.name: (Agent) inode已使用空间
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前磁盘已使用的inode空间量。采集方式（Linux）：执行df -i命令，查看IUsed列数据。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。

translation.name: (Agent) Used inodes
translation.note: This metric measures the used inode space of the current disk on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): Run the df -i command and check the IUsed column. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~.

name: (Agent) inode已使用占比
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前磁盘已使用的inode占比。采集方式（Linux）：执行df -i命令，查看IUse%列数据。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。

translation.name: (Agent) inode已使用占比
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前磁盘已使用的inode占比。采集方式（Linux）：执行df -i命令，查看IUse%列数据。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。

translation.name: (Agent) inode Usage
translation.note: This metric measures the percentage of used inodes on the current disk of the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): Run the df -i command and check the IUse% column. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~.

name: (Agent) 磁盘I/O使用率
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象磁盘I/O使用率。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十三列数据的变化得出磁盘I/O使用率。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) 磁盘I/O使用率
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象磁盘I/O使用率。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十三列数据的变化得出磁盘I/O使用率。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Disk I/O Usage
translation.note: This metric measures the disk I/O usage of the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): The disk I/O usage is calculated from the change in the thirteenth column of the corresponding device in /proc/diskstats during the collection period. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 平均I/O服务时长
note: 该指标用于统计指定时间段内，平均每个读或写I/O的操作时长。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十三列数据的变化与第四列数据和第八列数据和的变化相除得出磁盘平均I/O时长。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) 平均I/O服务时长
translation.note: 该指标用于统计指定时间段内，平均每个读或写I/O的操作时长。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十三列数据的变化与第四列数据和第八列数据和的变化相除得出磁盘平均I/O时长。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Average I/O Service Time
translation.note: This metric measures the average duration of each read or write I/O operation in the specified period. Collection method (Linux): The average I/O service time is calculated by dividing the change in the thirteenth column of the corresponding device in /proc/diskstats during the collection period by the sum of the changes in the fourth and eighth columns. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 平均队列长度
note: 该指标反映指定时间段内磁盘的繁忙程度，可用于评估磁盘I/O性能，指标值越大代表磁盘越繁忙，I/O性能越差。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十四列数据的变化与指标采集周期时间相除得出指标的值。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) 平均队列长度
translation.note: 该指标反映指定时间段内磁盘的繁忙程度，可用于评估磁盘I/O性能，指标值越大代表磁盘越繁忙，I/O性能越差。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十四列数据的变化与指标采集周期时间相除得出指标的值。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Average Queue Length
translation.note: This metric reflects how busy the disk is in the specified period and can be used to evaluate disk I/O performance. A larger value indicates a busier disk and poorer I/O performance. Collection method (Linux): The metric value is calculated by dividing the change in the fourteenth column of the corresponding device in /proc/diskstats during the collection period by the collection period duration. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 读操作平均耗时
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象磁盘读操作平均耗时。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第七列数据的变化得出磁盘读操作平均耗时。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) 读操作平均耗时
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象磁盘读操作平均耗时。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第七列数据的变化得出磁盘读操作平均耗时。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Average Read Time
translation.note: This metric measures the average time taken by disk read operations on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): The average disk read time is calculated from the change in the seventh column of the corresponding device in /proc/diskstats during the collection period. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 平均读操作大小
note: 该指标用于统计指定时间段内，平均每个读I/O操作传输的字节数。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第六列数据的变化与第四列数据的变化相除得出磁盘平均读操作大小。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) 平均读操作大小
translation.note: 该指标用于统计指定时间段内，平均每个读I/O操作传输的字节数。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第六列数据的变化与第四列数据的变化相除得出磁盘平均读操作大小。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Average Read Operation Size
translation.note: This metric measures the average number of bytes transferred per read I/O operation in the specified period. Collection method (Linux): The average read operation size is calculated by dividing the change in the sixth column of the corresponding device in /proc/diskstats during the collection period by the change in the fourth column. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 写操作平均耗时
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象磁盘写操作平均耗时。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十一列数据的变化得出磁盘写操作平均耗时。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) 写操作平均耗时
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象磁盘写操作平均耗时。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十一列数据的变化得出磁盘写操作平均耗时。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Average Write Time
translation.note: This metric measures the average time taken by disk write operations on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): The average disk write time is calculated from the change in the eleventh column of the corresponding device in /proc/diskstats during the collection period. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 平均写操作大小
note: 该指标用于统计指定时间段内，平均每个写I/O操作传输的字节数。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十列数据的变化与第八列数据的变化相除得出磁盘平均写操作大小。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) 平均写操作大小
translation.note: 该指标用于统计指定时间段内，平均每个写I/O操作传输的字节数。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/diskstats中对应设备第十列数据的变化与第八列数据的变化相除得出磁盘平均写操作大小。挂载点前缀路径长度不能超过64个字符，必须以字母开头，只能包含0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Average Write Operation Size
translation.note: This metric measures the average number of bytes transferred per write I/O operation in the specified period. Collection method (Linux): The average write operation size is calculated by dividing the change in the tenth column of the corresponding device in /proc/diskstats during the collection period by the change in the eighth column. The mount point prefix path cannot exceed 64 characters, must start with a letter, and can contain only 0-9/a-z/A-Z/-/./~. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) CPU使用率
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前CPU使用率。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/stat中的变化得出cpu使用率。用户可以通过top命令查看 %Cpu(s)值。采集方式（Windows）：通过WindowsAPI GetSystemTimes获取。

translation.name: (Agent) CPU使用率
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前CPU使用率。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/stat中的变化得出cpu使用率。用户可以通过top命令查看 %Cpu(s)值。采集方式（Windows）：通过WindowsAPI GetSystemTimes获取。

translation.name: (Agent) CPU Usage
translation.note: This metric measures the current CPU usage of the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): The CPU usage is calculated from the change in /proc/stat during the collection period. You can check the %Cpu(s) value with the top command. Collection method (Windows): Obtained through the Windows API GetSystemTimes.

name: (Agent) CPU空闲时间占比
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前CPU空闲时间占比。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/stat中的变化得出CPU空闲时间占比。采集方式（Windows）：通过WindowsAPI GetSystemTimes获取。

translation.name: (Agent) Idle CPU Usage
translation.note: This metric measures the percentage of time the CPU of the monitored object is currently idle. Collection method (Linux): The idle CPU time percentage is calculated from the change in /proc/stat during the collection period. Collection method (Windows): Obtained through the Windows API GetSystemTimes.

name: (Agent) iowait状态占比

translation.name: (Agent) iowait状态占比

translation.name: (Agent) CPU中断时间占比
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前CPU处理中断用时占用CPU时间的比率。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/stat中的变化得出CPU中断时间占比。用户可以通过top命令查看 %Cpu(s) hi值。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) Nice进程CPU使用率
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前Nice进程CPU使用率。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/stat中的变化得出Nice进程CPU使用率。用户可以通过top命令查看 %Cpu(s) ni值。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象当前Nice进程CPU使用率。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/stat中的变化得出Nice进程CPU使用率。用户可以通过top命令查看 %Cpu(s) ni值。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.note: This metric measures the current CPU usage of nice processes on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): The nice process CPU usage is calculated from the change in /proc/stat during the collection period. You can check the %Cpu(s) ni value with the top command. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 其他CPU使用率
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象其他占用CPU使用率。采集方式（Linux）：其他CPU使用率=1- 空闲CPU使用率（%）- 内核空间CPU使用率- 用户空间CPU使用率。采集方式（Windows）：其他CPU使用率=1- 空闲CPU使用率（%）- 内核空间CPU使用率- 用户空间CPU使用率。

translation.name: (Agent) 其他CPU使用率
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象其他占用CPU使用率。采集方式（Linux）：其他CPU使用率=1- 空闲CPU使用率（%）- 内核空间CPU使用率- 用户空间CPU使用率。采集方式（Windows）：其他CPU使用率=1- 空闲CPU使用率（%）- 内核空间CPU使用率- 用户空间CPU使用率。

translation.name: (Agent) Other CPU Usage
translation.note: This metric measures the CPU usage of other consumers on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): Other CPU usage = 1 - idle CPU usage (%) - kernel space CPU usage - user space CPU usage. Collection method (Windows): Other CPU usage = 1 - idle CPU usage (%) - kernel space CPU usage - user space CPU usage.

name: (Agent) CPU软中断时间占比

translation.note: This metric measures the current user space CPU usage of the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): The CPU usage is calculated from the change in /proc/stat during the collection period. You can check the %Cpu(s) us value with the top command. Collection method (Windows): Obtained through the Windows API GetSystemTimes.

name: (Agent) 1分钟平均负载
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象过去1分钟的CPU平均负载。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/loadavg中load1/逻辑CPU个数得到。用户可以通过top命令查看load1值。

translation.name: (Agent) 1分钟平均负载
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象过去1分钟的CPU平均负载。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/loadavg中load1/逻辑CPU个数得到。用户可以通过top命令查看load1值。

translation.name: (Agent) 1-Minute Load Average
translation.note: This metric measures the average CPU load of the monitored object over the past 1 minute. Collection method (Linux): Obtained by dividing load1 in /proc/loadavg by the number of logical CPUs. You can check the load1 value with the top command.

name: (Agent) 15分钟平均负载
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象过去15分钟的CPU平均负载。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/loadavg中load15/逻辑CPU个数得到。用户可以通过top命令查看load15值。

translation.note: This metric measures the average CPU load of the monitored object over the past 15 minutes. Collection method (Linux): Obtained by dividing load15 in /proc/loadavg by the number of logical CPUs. You can check the load15 value with the top command.

name: (Agent) 5分钟平均负载
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象过去5分钟的CPU平均负载。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/loadavg中load5/逻辑CPU个数得到。用户可以通过top命令查看load5值。

translation.name: (Agent) 5分钟平均负载
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象过去5分钟的CPU平均负载。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/loadavg中load5/逻辑CPU个数得到。用户可以通过top命令查看load5值。

translation.note: This metric measures the average CPU load of the monitored object over the past 5 minutes. Collection method (Linux): Obtained by dividing load5 in /proc/loadavg by the number of logical CPUs. You can check the load5 value with the top command.

name: (Agent) 可用内存
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象的可用内存。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo文件获取，若/proc/meminfo中显示MemAvailable，则直接可得若/proc/meminfo中不显示MemAvailable，则MemAvailable=MemFree+Buffers+Cached采集方式（Windows）：计算方法为（内存总量-已用内存量）。通过WindowsAPI GlobalMemoryStatusEx获取。

translation.name: (Agent) 可用内存
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象的可用内存。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo文件获取，若/proc/meminfo中显示MemAvailable，则直接可得若/proc/meminfo中不显示MemAvailable，则MemAvailable=MemFree+Buffers+Cached采集方式（Windows）：计算方法为（内存总量-已用内存量）。通过WindowsAPI GlobalMemoryStatusEx获取。

translation.name: (Agent) Available Memory
translation.note: This metric measures the available memory of the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): Obtained from the /proc/meminfo file. If MemAvailable is present in /proc/meminfo, it is used directly; otherwise, MemAvailable = MemFree + Buffers + Cached. Collection method (Windows): Calculated as (total memory - used memory), obtained through the Windows API GlobalMemoryStatusEx.

name: (Agent) Buffers占用量
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象的Buffers内存量。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo获取。用户可以通过top命令查看 KiB Mem:buffers值。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Buffers占用量
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象的Buffers内存量。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo获取。用户可以通过top命令查看 KiB Mem:buffers值。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Buffers
translation.note: This metric measures the amount of buffers memory on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): Obtained from /proc/meminfo. You can check the KiB Mem: buffers value with the top command. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) Cache占用量
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象Cache内存量。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo获取。用户可以通过top命令查看 KiB Swap:cached Mem值。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Cache占用量
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象Cache内存量。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo获取。用户可以通过top命令查看 KiB Swap:cached Mem值。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Cached Memory
translation.note: This metric measures the amount of cache memory on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): Obtained from /proc/meminfo. You can check the KiB Swap: cached Mem value with the top command. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 空闲内存量
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象的空闲内存量。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo获取。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) 空闲内存量
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象的空闲内存量。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo获取。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Free Memory
translation.note: This metric measures the amount of free memory on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): Obtained from /proc/meminfo. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 内存使用率
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象的内存使用率。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo文件获取，(MemTotal-MemAvailable)/MemTotal若/proc/meminfo中显示MemAvailable，则MemUsedPercent=(MemTotal-MemAvailable)/MemTotal若/proc/meminfo中不显示MemAvailable，则MemUsedPercent=(MemTotal-MemFree-Buffers-Cached)/MemTotal采集方式（Windows）：计算方法为（ 已用内存量/内存总量*100%）。

translation.name: (Agent) 内存使用率
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象的内存使用率。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/meminfo文件获取，(MemTotal-MemAvailable)/MemTotal若/proc/meminfo中显示MemAvailable，则MemUsedPercent=(MemTotal-MemAvailable)/MemTotal若/proc/meminfo中不显示MemAvailable，则MemUsedPercent=(MemTotal-MemFree-Buffers-Cached)/MemTotal采集方式（Windows）：计算方法为（ 已用内存量/内存总量*100%）。

translation.name: (Agent) Memory Usage
translation.note: This metric measures the memory usage of the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): Obtained from the /proc/meminfo file as (MemTotal - MemAvailable)/MemTotal. If MemAvailable is present in /proc/meminfo, MemUsedPercent = (MemTotal - MemAvailable)/MemTotal; otherwise, MemUsedPercent = (MemTotal - MemFree - Buffers - Cached)/MemTotal. Collection method (Windows): Calculated as (used memory / total memory * 100%).

name: (Agent) 出网带宽
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象网卡每秒发送的比特数。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/net/dev中的变化得出。采集方式（Windows）：使用WMI中MibIfRow对象获取网络指标数据。

translation.name: (Agent) 出网带宽
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象网卡每秒发送的比特数。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/net/dev中的变化得出。采集方式（Windows）：使用WMI中MibIfRow对象获取网络指标数据。

translation.name: (Agent) Outbound Bandwidth
translation.note: This metric measures the number of bits sent by the NIC of the monitored object per second. Collection method (Linux): Calculated from the change in /proc/net/dev during the collection period. Collection method (Windows): Network metric data is obtained from the WMI MibIfRow object.

name: (Agent) 入网带宽
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象网卡每秒接收的比特数。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/net/dev中的变化得出。采集方式（Windows）：使用WMI中MibIfRow对象获取网络指标数据。

translation.name: (Agent) 入网带宽
translation.note: 该指标用于统计测量对象网卡每秒接收的比特数。采集方式（Linux）：通过计算采集周期内/proc/net/dev中的变化得出。采集方式（Windows）：使用WMI中MibIfRow对象获取网络指标数据。

translation.name: (Agent) Inbound Bandwidth
translation.note: This metric measures the number of bits received by the NIC of the monitored object per second. Collection method (Linux): Calculated from the change in /proc/net/dev during the collection period. Collection method (Windows): Network metric data is obtained from the WMI MibIfRow object.

name: (Agent) 接收丢包率

translation.name: (Agent) 接收丢包率

translation.name: (Agent) Receive Packet Loss Rate
translation.note: This metric measures the percentage of packets received and discarded by the NIC of the monitored object per second, relative to the total packets received. Collection method (Linux): Calculated from the change in /proc/net/dev during the collection period. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

translation.name: (Agent) Send Packet Loss Rate
translation.note: This metric measures the percentage of packets sent and discarded by the NIC of the monitored object per second, relative to the total packets sent. Collection method (Linux): RSS*PAGESIZE/MemTotal, where RSS is obtained from the second column of /proc/pid/statm, PAGESIZE is obtained with the getconf PAGESIZE command, and MemTotal is obtained from /proc/meminfo. Collection method (Windows): The total memory is obtained through the Windows API GlobalMemoryStatusEx, the used memory is obtained through GetProcessMemoryInfo, and the memory usage is calculated as the ratio of the two.

translation.name: (Agent) Running Processes
translation.note: This metric counts the number of processes in the running state on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): The status of each process is obtained from the Status value in /proc/pid/status, and the total number of processes in each state is counted. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.

name: (Agent) 睡眠进程数
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象处于睡眠状态的进程数。采集方式（Linux）：通过统计 /proc/pid/status 中Status值获取每个进程的状态，进而统计各个状态进程总数。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Specified Processes
translation.note: This metric counts the number of specified processes on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): The status of each process is obtained from the Status value in /proc/pid/status, and the total number of processes in each state is counted. Collection method (Windows): The total number of processes is obtained through the psapi.dll system process status support module.

name: (Agent) 文件句柄总数
note: 该指标用于统计测量对象的所有进程使用的句柄总和。采集方式（Linux）：通过/proc/{pid}/fd文件汇总所有进程使用的句柄数。采集方式（Windows）：暂不支持。

translation.name: (Agent) Total File Handles
translation.note: This metric counts the total number of handles used by all processes on the monitored object. Collection method (Linux): The number of handles used by all processes is summed up from the /proc/{pid}/fd files. Collection method (Windows): Not supported yet.
